init_hook: if [ -f package.json ]; then echo '[devbox] Installing npm deps…'; npm install; fi
if [ -f package.json ]; then echo '[devbox] Installing Playwright browsers…'; npx --yes playwright install --with-deps || true; fi
if [ -f package.json ] && ! npm ls ws --workspace=@starbuds/server >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[devbox] Ensuring ws dependency…'; npm install ws --workspace=@starbuds/server; fi
